headline: Sempra Poised Well for Growth on LNG and Utility Investments
summary: SRE expands LNG, utility and renewable energy investments to meet rising power demand, though wildfire risks remain a concern.

raw.headline: Sempra Poised Well for Growth on LNG and Utility Investments
raw.summary: SRE expands LNG, utility and renewable energy investments to meet rising power demand, though wildfire risks remain a concern.

headline: SoCalGas Helps Customers Save More Than $106 Million Through Energy Efficiency Programs
summary: Southern California Gas Co. (SoCalGas), a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), announced today that its energy efficiency programs helped customers save more than $106 million on their utility bills in 2025—reducing energy use by approximately 54 million net therms, enough to serve about 38,000 homes annually1.
